message:
test(harness): add btrfs xattr coverage for overwrite/nonexistent paths (bd-b25w4)

Adds three btrfs E2E tests matching ext4 parity:
- btrfs_fuse_xattr_overwrite_value
- btrfs_fuse_xattr_get_nonexistent_returns_error
- btrfs_fuse_xattr_remove_nonexistent_fails

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
